creator: gahr@gahr.ch
text:
I don't see why a PORTREVISION bump is needed here. I propose we commit
the fix without.

On 2010-May-18, 14:30, Aragon Gouveia wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/146692; it has been noted by GNATS.
> 
> From: Aragon Gouveia <aragon@phat.za.net>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org, gahr@freebsd.org
> Cc:  
> Subject: Re: ports/146692: [patch] mail/ssmpt -- use full paths in MAILERCONF
> Date: Tue, 18 May 2010 16:21:49 +0200
> 
>  This is a multi-part message in MIME format.
>  --------------000107010900070206070900
>  Content-Type: text/plain; charset=ISO-8859-1; format=flowed
>  Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
>  
>  Looks good.  PORTREVISION added in attached patch.
>  
>  Thanks!
>  
>  --------------000107010900070206070900
>  Content-Type: text/plain;
>   name="ssmtp.txt"
>  Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
>  Content-Disposition: attachment;
>   filename="ssmtp.txt"
>  
>  diff -uNr ssmtp.orig/Makefile ssmtp/Makefile
>  --- ssmtp.orig/Makefile	2010-05-18 16:17:37.000000000 +0200
>  +++ ssmtp/Makefile	2010-05-18 16:18:07.000000000 +0200
>  @@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
>   
>   PORTNAME=	ssmtp
>   PORTVERSION=	2.62.3
>  +PORTREVISION=	1
>   CATEGORIES=	mail ipv6
>   MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_DEBIAN_POOL}
>   DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}_2.62.orig
>  @@ -69,8 +70,8 @@
>   	@${ECHO_CMD} "send-mail	${PREFIX}/sbin/ssmtp" >> ${MAILERCONF}
>   	@${ECHO_CMD} "mailq		${PREFIX}/sbin/ssmtp" >> ${MAILERCONF}
>   	@${ECHO_CMD} "newaliases	${PREFIX}/sbin/ssmtp" >> ${MAILERCONF}
>  -	@${ECHO_CMD} "hoststat	${TRUE}" >> ${MAILERCONF}
>  -	@${ECHO_CMD} "purgestat	${TRUE}" >> ${MAILERCONF}
>  +	@${ECHO_CMD} "hoststat	/usr/bin/true" >> ${MAILERCONF}
>  +	@${ECHO_CMD} "purgestat	/usr/bin/true" >> ${MAILERCONF}
>   
>   pre-su-install:
>   	@${SETENV} ${SCRIPTS_ENV} PKG_PREFIX=${PREFIX} \
>  
>  --------------000107010900070206070900--

-- 
Pietro Cerutti
The FreeBSD Project
gahr@FreeBSD.org

PGP Public Key:
http://gahr.ch/pgp
